target: 30. The Mysterious Woman
I am unable to answer the phone right now. After the beep, please leave your name and message.
(He's out... that old man. To think he lives without even owning a cell phone.)
(Has he never considered the trouble he causes others? Good grief...)

Huh…?
This sign is…
("Funeral Service for the Late Ushio Kofune"... There's a funeral today...)
(Kofune… Ushio?)
Ushio!!!!
11:45 AM. Arrived at the funeral hall.
The deceased is Ushio Kofune...
I know this girl...
Hizuru-chan!?
Ah, I knew it!
Hizuru Minakata-chan. ...Right!?
...You figured it out easily... Masahito Karikiri.
Well, you've grown into a beautiful woman...!! How many years has it been!? Hizuru-chan!
It's been 14 years…
Has it really been that long...
What have you been up to since then? I was worried about you...
(...It's fine to step on his shadow. This guy isn't a Shadow.)
Ushio Kofune, could it be... From Western Food Kofune...!?
...Yes. Yesterday... in an accident at sea...
Did someone tell you about Ushio-chan?
…No.
Eh! Then why are you on the island? It's not like you moved back, right?
Right. I'm in Tokyo right now...
Ah, wait. Let me guess!?
Huh?
You were always smart, Hizuru-chan, so you must be a teacher or a lawyer, or maybe a doctor?
...It's all starting to come back to me now.
Huh?
I found you physically repulsive!! And I still find you repulsive now!!!!
Ahaha! Always telling lies!
Regrettably, it is the truth!!

Ah!
Alain-san!!
Hm?
Do you know who this is! You're going to be surprised. Actually--
Hizuru Minakata.
Ahh! Jeez, let me say it!
Hizuru... you mean that Hizuru!!?
It's been a while, Alain...
Wow, I'm so happy... I never thought I'd get to see you again on a day like this...
If you'd like, you should see Ushio's face before you go...
Yes, of course…
! It's from Mio... Excuse me for a moment.
Hello…
(Back then…)
(When I was in my second year of middle school, I was a regular at Western Food Kofune.)
(Alain had two daughters. Ushio and Mio...)
(I heard Alain's wife passed away shortly after giving birth to Mio-chan.)
(While Alain was working, the customers would look after the children, but...)
(To think that Ushio... could it be...)
What was that!? He fell in!?
And...!? Is he okay?
What's wrong?
Shinpei fell into the sea on his way here... Seems like he'll be a little late...
(…Shinpei?)
Oh, that's terrible!
...Then let's wait a bit! We can't start if Shinpei-kun isn't here.
Alain!
Hm?
Just now... who is this "Shinpei"!?
Ah... Hizuru had already left the island, so you wouldn't know him.
He's the son of my best friend. I took in a boy named Shinpei Ajiro.
(…Ajiro… Shinpei…)
About exactly 10 years ago, I think. His parents passed away in a boat accident...
Shinpei-kun had no other relatives... So Alain-san became his foster parent.
Oh, that's right! Shinpei is in Tokyo too! He's attending a culinary school--
Excuse me.
Hizuru!!?
(The boy sitting in front of me on the ferry... That really was Shinpei Ajiro!!)
(I checked by stepping on his shadow just in case, but at that point he was human.)
(But there's no guarantee he's still human now...!! I can't meet him! Not yet...!!)
(The voice of the mysterious woman who lured me to the island... With the authenticity of that message and the owner of the voice still unknown... I can't trust anyone!)
(Fortunately, no one has realized my true identity yet. I need to make my move while I still can--)
Wait, Hizuru!!
…Alain?
...Yoshikawa lines!?
Yeah... On Ushio's... neck... There are marks like she was strangled and tried to resist...

Wait, Alain!!
Are the police that stupid?
Are they really going to cremate the body the very next day even while recognizing it might be a criminal case!?
...No... Dr. Hishigata said it was drowning...
(...Seidou Hishigata, huh. The only doctor on this island.)
It's true that the situation makes murder impossible...!!
The one who told me was the doctor's son, Sou-kun. He was the one who performed CPR on Ushio...
And that's when he saw it. The scratch marks on her neck...
The victim's fingernails often have the culprit's blood or skin fragments caught in them. Did they check Ushio-chan's nails?
That's inexplicable...
...Hey. Don't you think it's similar? To 14 years ago... when Ryunosuke died...!!
Ryunosuke, Ryunosuke!!

target: Open... your eyes...! Ryunosuke!!

target: ...Why!! Why did this... Haine!!

target:
Hizuru?
Where are you going?!
Hey, hey!! What are you doing!? Opening the coffin, are you out of your mind!!
Let go, you idiot!!
What did you say!? I'll arrest you, hey!!
(Ushio's body... at first glance, there were no abnormalities. But...!!)
(Beneath the makeup applied to her, there were Yoshikawa lines...!)

Who did this makeup?!
Alain!
Ah... yeah... It was a nurse from Hishigata Clinic. Negoro-san...
Eh!!!! A-Alain-san, this H-cu... No, do you know this woman!?
Who is she!? B-By all means, please introduce me!!
Stop messing around, you piece of trash!!

I'm not an H-cup.
…I'm a G-cup!!
That's what you're mad about!?
What is all this commotion!?

!
Dr. Hishigata!!

What are you doing opening the coffin?!
That's desecrating the dead!!
No, Sensei...!! She is a friend of mine--
Who is the one desecrating the dead, I wonder?
…I'll take my leave then.
Ah!! Wait!! At least tell me your name!!
(My vocabulary getting poor when I'm excited is a bad habit... I need to fix that...)
Hizuru!
Sorry for the commotion. I'll take my leave.
I'm sorry... I said something weird... please forget it.
…Hizuru?
developer_comments: 喪服姿の女性（影アサコ）

target: Asako Isokane...
Ah, right. To you, I'm still Isokane, huh.
developer_comments: 喪服姿の女性（影アサコ）

target: Listen, I'm not Isokane anymore. I got married and became a Kobayakawa.
Ah, my apologies.
To be honest, I really wanted to invite you to the wedding.
But you wouldn't give me your address or phone number, Hizuru... Have you been doing well?
Depends on your definition of doing well... My heart is still beating.
Haha, you haven't changed at all.
...Do you remember? About Ushio-chan.
At the wake yesterday, everyone was talking about things like how I was always the one changing her diapers...
Why... why did it have to come to this...!
Ushio-chan... you see... She saved... my daughter... And passed away...!!
Ushio-chan is... my daughter's lifesaver...
Asako-chan... Ushio was Ushio until the very end. The most important thing is that Shiori-chan is safe.
Alain-san…
(What is she... crying for? This thing...)
(This cheap acting makes me sick to my stomach...)
(At your feet... The main body is twisted into an unnatural shape as if to avoid my toes, you know?)
(The "Shadow"...!!!!)
(...Asako has likely been killed. Already...!!)
(Died saving her daughter? Ushio-chan is her daughter's lifesaver!? Unforgivable...!!)
(Wearing Asako's face... Just how much do you plan to insult Alain and Ushio!!)
